title: Nilpotent Groups
abstract:
Abstract
                  With the general theory of the previous chapter in hand, we can begin the structural analysis of groups of finite Morley rank. The general theory occupies Chapters 6 through 9. The present chapter deals with the structure theory for nilpotent groups. For the study of simple groups on the whole, the structure of solvable groups in general is of more significance than the special case of nilpotent groups, but in any case we will see in Section 6.2 that there is a general structure theory for nilpotent groups which is remarkably close to the structure theory available in the abelian case (Exercise 9, page 72).
